primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between disease and matched control cohorts.
evidence: We compared multiple BC cell lines and primary tissues of similar PAM50 subtypes to determine the specificity of UNC0965 in dissecting the intra-tumor heterogeneity
two tissue samples of the corresponding BC PAM50 subtypes paired with their adjacent normal (non-malignant) tissues

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison across cell activation, maturation, or differentiation states.
evidence: the G9a/GLP-interacting epiproteomes are assembled in a BC-subtypic manner

one luminal-specific cluster of eighty-four proteins... showed increased UNC0965 affinity specifically in the luminal subtype but decreased affinity in the BLBC subtype; another BLBC-specific cluster of seventy proteins showed an opposite UNC0965-binding pattern

attributes.route_or_context: biotin-tagged small molecule probe specifically binds the enzymatically active form of the histone lysine methyltransferases G9a and G9a-like protein (GLP)
evidence: ChaC employs UNC0965, a biotin-tagged small molecule that specifically binds the enzymatically active form of the histone lysine methyltransferases G9a and G9a-like protein (GLP)
1 mg nuclear proteins extracted from either cell lines or clinical tissues were incubated with 2 nmole UNC0965 pre-coupled to 50 μl neutravidin-agarose (Thermo-Fisher) overnight at 4OC

replicate_hints: two to three biological replicates, each with three technical replicate runs
three liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS) technical replicates for each of two biological replicates

evidence: compared with non-malignant mammary cells, PCR amplification of the UNC0965-captured genes revealed that G9a was specifically enriched within the chromatin of tumor suppressor genes... in the malignant/tumor cells
one luminal-specific cluster of eighty-four proteins... showed increased UNC0965 affinity specifically in the luminal subtype but decreased affinity in the BLBC subtype

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The study explicitly uses label-free quantitation (LFQ) with data-dependent acquisition (DDA) on Velos LTQ Orbitrap and Q-Exactive instruments.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment uses a biotinylated small molecule probe (UNC0965) for the sorting/enrichment of G9a-interacting protein complexes (ChaC method).
